owner_operator_stated: Directory listings (Yelp, WebMD, Healthgrades) show the record's exact phone number (630) 629-6688 and address 929 S Main St Ste 108B currently belong to Dr. Kevin G. Krug, DDS -- a different practice than the named entity 'Dentistry With Sedation.' The DBA 'Dentistry With Sedation' has its own website (sedation-dentistry.com / Sanders Family Dental, Dr. Leslie & David Sanders) whose own contact page states its address as 919 S Main St and phone (630) 620-0929 -- a different suite and phone than this record, despite sharing the same street.
notes: 929 S Main St, Lombard is a multi-tenant dental building with several independent offices in different suites. The record's exact phone (630) 629-6688 traces to Suite 108B / Dr. Kevin Krug per directory listings, not to the 'Dentistry With Sedation' DBA (Suite 100, sedation-dentistry.com), which uses a different phone and a slightly different street number (919 vs 929) on its own site. No dedicated website could be corroborated for this record by address AND phone together, so this is treated as an ownership conflict rather than a confirmed match.

owner_operator_stated: Site names Dr. Brett Blacher, DDS as owner/founder, with Dr. Pam Brosnan and Dr. Naimi Shah as associate dentists. The practice is branded 'Brett Blacher DDS,' not 'Grove Dental.'
notes: Record's exact address (450 E 22nd St, Ste 201) and exact phone ((630) 916-0701) both match Brett Blacher DDS's own contact page precisely -- but the current occupant is branded 'Brett Blacher DDS,' an independent practice unrelated to the corporate 'Grove Dental Associates' chain (which has its own separate Lombard location at 2 E 22nd St, phone (630) 627-4680). Treated as a successor/ownership conflict because the corroborated site is a different named entity than the record ('Grove Dental'). No careers/hiring page found on the site.

Vendor hint 'Westchesterfamilydental.Net' does not corroborate: that site's own contact page lists a different address (4 Westbrook Corporate Ctr Ste 102, Westchester, IL 60154-5785) and different phone ((708) 562-5621), and its doctor roster (Thakrar, Raichand, Pinkerton, Seide) does not include Lisa Balcerak or Lisa Voorhees. Third-party directory aggregators (Healthgrades, everydentist.com) confirm the record's own address (1600 Westchester Blvd) and phone ((708) 865-1484) under 'Michelle DeVaull Pinkerton, DDS / Lisa Voorhees, DDS,' but no dedicated practice website could be found for that location within search budget, so no site could be corroborated by rule 1.
